professional_fees.role: Automation Engineer / Programmer, Field Service Manager
Senior Automation Engineer / Programmer / Project Manager

special_charges: All after-hours, weekends, and emergency services requested by clients will be provided at 1.5× the standard labor rate. All holiday services will be provided at 2.0× the standard labor rates.
Expert witness testimony, depositions and similar meetings associated with pending or on-going legal actions shall be provided at 1.5× the standard labor rate.
All credit card transactions will include 5% of the total charge added to the price.
A 4-hour minimum labor charge applies to all unscheduled maintenance and emergency services.
Swing shift work shall be labor rates above +10%. Graveyard shifts shall be rates above +20%.
Prices on equipment are subject to change due to tariffs.

other_charges.label: Calibration Gas
other_charges.charge: $25 for each hour of field usage

other_charges.label: Service Van
other_charges.charge: $25 for each hour of field usage, or a maximum of $100 per day

reimbursable.intro: Including: permit fees, mail & courier services, leased equipment, reproductions, travel and other direct expenses.
